front: Play: Regina Giddens blackmails brothers after nephew Leo steals Union Pacific bonds from her wheelchair-bound husband's safe deposit box
Play: husband dies of heart attack while crawling upstairs for medicine as wife watches
Play: servant calls the family "people who ate the earth"
Play: student Mary Tilford accuses teachers Karen Wright and Martha Dobie of being lesbians
Play: blackmails Rosalie Wells with a stolen bracelet to corroborate
Play: one accused teacher commits suicide
Play: the other tells her "I loved you the way they said"
Play: Julian brings new bride Lily home to spinster sisters Anna and Carrie
Play: Albertine has a relationship with black chauffeur Henry
Play: Sophie blackmails Nina for $5,000 after her drunk husband Nick Denery passes out in Sophie's bed at Constance Tuckerman's boarding house
Play: prequel depicting the Hubbard family under patriarch Marcus
back: Another Part of the Forest (Lillian Hellman)

front: Play: Lavinia wants to start a school for Black children

front: Play: Marcus led Union troops to massacre Confederates

front: Author: refused to name names to HUAC, declaring "I cannot and will not cut my conscience to fit this year's fashions"
Author: Mary McCarthy said "every word she writes is a lie, including 'and' and 'the'" on The Dick Cavett Show; sued McCarthy for libel
Author: memoir Pentimento contains disputed "Julia" chapter about smuggling $50,000 in a fur hat
Author: Muriel Gardiner claimed to be the real Julia
Author: partner of Dashiell Hammett; wrote original libretto for Bernstein's Candide
